tactical_shape: Dominant possession and territorial pressure, but struggled to break down a deep, organised defensive block
Introduced Lamine Yamal on 70 minutes to change the mood, but not the outcome
standout_players: Unai Simón: saved Diney Borges’ late header
Dani Olmo: made a crucial block from Kevin Pina
Mikel Oyarzabal: had a header saved by Vozinha
Ferran Torres: hit the bar and was denied by Vozinha
Aymeric Laporte: had a header saved by Vozinha
Lamine Yamal: changed the mood on introduction, but did not alter history
home_read.momentum: A damaging and unexpected setback, but the message from Merino is to stay calm and avoid panic; Spain still see themselves as capable of responding.

tactical_shape: Courageous, compact and extremely well-organised without the ball
Defended with bodies on the line while still carrying a threat on the break and in late moments
standout_players: Bubista: praised for preparing a team that resisted Spain and deserved the draw
Pico Lopes: produced an astonishing late block to deny Dani Olmo
Vozinha: made a series of saves, including from Oyarzabal, Torres and Laporte
Diney Borges: had a 90th-minute header saved by Unai Simón
Ryan Mendes: had a late chance as Cape Verde pressed for more
Kevin Pina: forced a block from Dani Olmo
away_read.momentum: Historic debut draw against one of the favourites gives Cape Verde huge belief and a story that will live for ever.
